dataset: OpenAI text-embedding-3-large (Qdrant dbpedia 1M precomputed), Matryoshka-256, 990k base / 10k queries (2k used per run)
config: 256-bit binary funnel + exact f32 rerank; ITQ = learned 256x256 rotation (50k sample, 30 iters) vs random FWHT rotation; both with residual

code_uniqueness.note: identical with and without residual — recall loss is ranking error, not identity loss

final_operating_point.config: learned rotation (ITQ) + residual + batch=1 + rerank C=2000
final_operating_point.note: recall from the itq bin (identical scan+rerank workload as vsearch, cross-validated: random column reproduces vsearch exactly); QPS/latency from vsearch batch=1 C=2000 (rotation choice does not affect query-time work). 16 vCPU — not comparable to the 8-vCPU sweep in 062/064.
